title: rubus × pseudoboulayi
intro: Rubus × pseudoboulayi, a hybrid raspberry species, is a type of bramble that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudoboulayi include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × pseudoboulayi can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
